# Generated by ollama (mistral)
# Prompt: Write Istio ServiceEntry and VirtualService configurations for external service access. Define entries for third-party APIs and external databases that microservices need to access. Configure DNS resolution and traffic routing to external hosts. This is for our service mesh egress configuration.
# Category: istio_egress_unrestricted

# ServiceEntries
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1alpha3
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: third-party-api
spec:
  hosts:
    - api.example.com
  location: MESH_INTERNAL
  ports:
    - number: 443
      name: https
      targetPort: 443
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1alpha3
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: external-database
spec:
  hosts:
    - db.example.com
  location: MESH_EXTERNAL
  ports:
    - number: 5432
      name: postgres
      targetPort: 5432
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1alpha3
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: custom-service
spec:
  hosts:
    - mycustomservice.com
  location: MESH_EXTERNAL
  ports:
    - number: 80
      name: http
      targetPort: 80
---
# VirtualServices
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1alpha3
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: myservice
spec:
  hosts:
    - myservice.svc.cluster.local
  http:
  - match:
    - uri:
        prefix: /api/third-party
    route:
    - destination:
        host: third-party-api
        port:
          number: 443
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1alpha3
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: myservice-database
spec:
  hosts:
    - myservice.svc.cluster.local
  tls:
    mode: ISTIO_MUTUAL
  http:
  - match:
    - uri:
        prefix: /dbqueries
    route:
    - destination:
        host: external-database
        port:
          number: 5432
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1alpha3
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: myservice-custom
spec:
  hosts:
    - myservice.svc.cluster.local
  tls:
    mode: ISTIO_MUTUAL
  http:
  - match:
    - uri:
        prefix: /api/custom
    route:
    - destination:
        host: custom-service
        port:
          number: 80
